subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One, in the land of exile, maketh mention of God's loved ones and His chosen ones with a remembrance that God hath ordained as a light unto all people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان المظلوم فی دیار الغربه یذکر اولیاء الله و اصفیائه بذکر جعله الله نورا لاهل
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
